risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability in Afghanistan
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) financing for the project has been canceled, and IDA grants remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in the country, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Rating Affecting Project Execution
risk_summary: Political and governance risk is rated as High across all assessment periods, directly constraining the project's ability to execute planned activities and maintain institutional capacity for implementation.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating: High, Proposed Rating: High

risk_title: Uncertainty Over Project Activities Delaying Implementation
risk_summary: Uncertainty regarding project activities in the current Afghanistan context is causing delays in critical implementation milestones, including establishment of grievance redress mechanisms and recruitment of key personnel.
evidence_quote: Progress is behind schedule, partly due to COVID-19 and uncertainty over project activities. Establishment of GRM is pending recruitment of a safeguard specialist.
